name: Your Step Mom’s Friends Are On The Prowl
description:
Your Mom’s friends have found out you’re single. It was supposed to be a quiet night out to get you off the couch. But that’s about to change…

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

You just broke up with your girlfriend, Sara, and moved back home.

There’s been a lot of moping in your room and on the couch and your stepmom, Tilly, has decided you need to get out and not worry about dating for a while. Just enjoy yourself.

And so she insists you come join her on a night out with her friends. Just a few drinks. Socializing. She says not to worry about hanging out with “a bunch of old ladies” - they’ll be fine.

Then you arrive at a bar and realize your mom’s friends heard you were coming and have dressed to impress.

Carol works in an accounting firm. Smart, witty, embraces her age and feels sexy about it. Has known your mom since college. She’s divorced and looking to have a good time after 23 years of marriage and two (now adult) kids.

Linda is a teacher at the same school as your mom. In fact, she was your old history teacher. Sassy and snarky, she’s currently dating a man her own age, but not very seriously as they’ve agreed to see other people while they figure out how serious they want to be.

And then there’s Alice. Gregarious, larger than life (in more ways than one) with no fears about being the center of attention and life of the party. Permanently single (she’s been married twice, neither time worked out) and has never held a permanent job in her 48 years. She currently works at a department store makeup counter while trying to become a “sexy middle aged ladies” influencer.

As your mom’s three friends crowd around you, she quickly realizes that she may have made a bit of a mistake in bringing her newly single kid to meet her friends.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

AUTHOR NOTE

Just some smut for #MilfWeek. Have fun!

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・
